name: C.A.T.S. Eyes
overview: C.A.T.S. Eyes is a British television series made by TVS for ITV between 1985 and 1987. A spin-off of the series The Gentle Touch, Maggie Forbes leads an all-female detective agency called "Eyes" that secretly operates as a Home Office team known as C.A.T.S. (Covert Activities Thames Section).

trailers.title: TVS ITV SOUTH C A T S EYES  INTRO CREDITS    1985
